title: Ballista
body:
This mod adds siege engines to minecraft.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nVZf4X22YhU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/R-jMGZ0TtIM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Click with the engineers hammer to construct a siege engine. 
Shift click with the engineers hammer to deconstruct.

The following siege engines are currently completed:

The Ballista:
- click with empty hand to draw
- click with ballista arrow in hand to load
- click to shoot
- shit click to take control
- shift click to release control
- repair a broken ballista with the ballista repair item
